name: Formula

values.name: errorString
values.comment: Format parsing error

values.name: freeFormula
values.comment: Returns set of all free variables in given formula

values.name: isAlpha
values.comment: Is the signed formula of type Alpha

values.name: isBeta
values.comment: Is the signed formula of type Beta

values.name: isDelta
values.comment: Is the signed formula of type Delta

values.name: isGamma
values.comment: Is the signed formula of type Gamma

values.name: isSignedComplementary
values.comment: Is the first Signed Formula complementary of the second Signed Formula

values.name: isSignedSubformulaOf
values.comment: Is the first a Signed subformula of the second

values.name: isSubformulaOf
values.comment: Is the first a subformula of the second

values.name: parse
values.comment: Parse string to Formula

values.name: parseSigned
values.comment: Parse string to Signed Formula

values.name: parseTerm
values.comment: Parses string to Term

values.name: removeQuantifierAndSubstitute
values.comment: Removes quantifier from given signed formula and returns formula after substitution or error

values.name: signedGetFormula
values.comment: Get Formula out of Signed Formula

values.name: signedSubformulas
values.comment: Get signed subformulas as a list of signed formulas

values.name: strFormula
values.comment: String representation of a Formula

values.name: strSigned
values.comment: String representation of a Signed Formula

values.name: strSubstitution
values.comment: String representation of a Substitution

values.name: strTerm
values.comment: String representation of a Term

values.name: substitute
values.comment:
Checks if substitution is applicable and substitutes if yes. Returns Result.
ErrMessage or Formula after substitution
